synopsis:
Doctor Aphra 21 is the twenty-first issue of the Marvel canon comic book series Star Wars: Doctor Aphra (2020)
The SPARK ETERNAL corrupts everything it touches, and DOCTOR APHRA is no exception!  Face-to-face with an ancient, malevolent presence, SANA STARROS will have to make a choice… Can she save Aphra? Can she even save herself?
title: Doctor Aphra (2020) #21
